name: Chocolate Biscotti Tart
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Ground pecans or other nuts
recipeInstructions: To prepare crust, grind Chocolate Biscotti to make 2 cups crumbs. Mix crumbs in a bowl with melted butter and ground nuts until well combined. Place 6 (4") tart pans on a baking sheet. Press crumb mixture onto bottoms of rings and up sides. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes. Remove tart shells from oven and remove rings from shells. Refrigerate shells on baking sheet until ready to use. Cut 6 strips of wax paper, 17" x 1-1/2". Spread melted chocolate evenly over strips. Let chocolate strips cool slightly, then wrap evenly around outside of tart shell. Leave wax paper in place. Spoon 3/4 cup caramel topping into each tart shell. Replace shells in refrigerator until needed. Divide cooled filling among the 6 biscotti shells. Refrigerate for 2 hours. When ready to serve, whip cream until thick. From a pastry bag, pipe cream onto each tart. Gently peel wax paper off outside of tarts and serve at once.
